description: Trigger harness CI on core sandbox config changes by covering Makefile and harness.yaml in ci-harness.yml.

userStories.title: Cover core sandbox config in harness CI triggers
userStories.description: As the harness maintainer, I want harness CI to trigger on core sandbox config changes so that provisioning regressions receive automatic feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Makefile to both push.paths and pull_request.paths in .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml
Add harness.yaml to both push.paths and pull_request.paths in .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml
Preserve existing workflow path filters and job behavior
Do not rename, move, delete, or change behavior of Makefile or harness.yaml

userStories.title: Guard core path-filter coverage with a probe
userStories.description: As the harness maintainer, I want a regression probe for core CI path filters so that future workflow edits cannot silently remove coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an executable eval probe at evals/probes/harness-ci-core-paths.sh
Probe checks .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml for Makefile and harness.yaml under both on.push.paths and on.pull_request.paths
Probe includes # tier:, # source:, and # desc: headers and resolves repo root via BASH_SOURCE
Probe emits PASS/REGRESSION/SKIPPED with one-line diagnostics and exits non-zero only for actionable regression
Do not modify .claude/skills/eval/** or the eval runner
